title: Specklinia crenata
taxonomy: Specklinia crenata is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This family consists of approximately 30,000 known species, making it one of the largest and most diverse groups of flowering plants. Within the Orchidaceae family, Specklinia crenata is placed in the subfamily Epidendroideae, which includes the majority of orchid species. The genus Specklinia is further divided into several species, with Specklinia crenata being one of them. The classification of Specklinia crenata reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the orchid family.
